name: FTL: Faster Than Light (Trainer)
description: Trainer for FTL: Faster Than Light (Linux native). Pointer chains follow: [0x63A7F8] = ShipStatus/CommandGui*, +0x10 = ShipManager*. Resource fields use freeze-on-enable to maintain values every poll tick. Power uses code patches since the PowerManager has clean single-path functions.

fields.name: Infinite Fuel
fields.description: Freezes fuel at 99 by rewriting every poll tick.

fields.name: Infinite Missiles
fields.description: Freezes missiles at 99 by rewriting every poll tick. Writes to both the WeaponControl path and ShipManager fallback.

on_enable.description: Set missiles to 99 via ShipManager fallback (+0x8F4)

fields.name: Infinite Drone Parts
fields.description: Freezes drone parts at 99 by rewriting every poll tick. Writes to both the DroneControl path and ShipManager fallback.

on_enable.description: Set drone parts to 99 via ShipManager fallback (+0x8F0)

on_enable_alt.description: Set drone parts to 99 via DroneControl (+0x90) -> +0x260

fields.name: Infinite Scrap
fields.description: Freezes scrap at 99999 by rewriting every poll tick.

fields.name: Infinite Power
fields.description: NOPs the reactor power deduction in PowerManager::IncreasePower and DecreasePower so the reactor always shows full. Sets reactor to 30 bars on enable.

on_enable.description: Set reactor to full (used=0, total=30) via PowerManager::powerManagers[0]

patches.description: NOP 'add [rdi], 1' in IncreasePower — stops used_power from incrementing when powering a system
NOP 'jl' availability check in IncreasePower — allows allocation even when reactor shows no free bars
NOP 'sub [rdi], 1' in DecreasePower — stops used_power from decrementing when depowering a system

fields.name: Invincible Hull
fields.description: NOPs the call to Ship::DamageHull and the hull value store in ShipManager::DamageHull, so the ship never takes hull damage. Sets hull to max (30) on enable.

on_enable.description: Set hull to max (30) via ShipManager -> Ship.hull (+0x188)

patches.description: NOP 'call Ship::DamageHull' + 'mov [rbx+0x618], eax' in ShipManager::DamageHull — hull damage is never applied

fields.name: Infinite Cloaking
fields.description: NOPs the TimerHelper::Update() call in CloakingSystem::OnLoop so the cloak timer never advances. Once activated, cloaking lasts indefinitely. Requires cloaking system installed.

patches.description: NOP 'call TimerHelper::Update' in CloakingSystem::OnLoop — cloak timer never ticks
